context.projectOverview: agent-bober is a multi-agent autonomous build harness (TypeScript/ESM, npm CLI + MCP server). This spec extends the existing medical team (arch-20260616-medical-team, ADRs 1-7) to production-grade for a single self-responsible user. Sprint 1 closes the code-enforced non-emergency refusal gap: prescription/specific-dosing/individualized-treatment-plan prompts must be refused deterministically BEFORE any LLM call, mirroring the existing red-flag short-circuit.

completedSprints.title: Base medical team
completedSprints.summary: Already on branch bober/medical-team: src/medical/ module with MedicalSopEngine, MedicalGuardrails+RedFlagDetector (0-LLM emergency short-circuit), consent fail-closed, deterministic JS numerics, FactStore meds, EgressGuard zero-egress default (cloud-inference + literature-retrieval axes), Apple Health SAX import, MedlinePlus opt-in cited synthesis. GuardrailVerdict already has {kind:'refuse'} and AuditEvent already has 'refuse' — but evaluate() never emits refuse yet. That is the gap this sprint closes.
